The year **2007** was the 15th year in the history of [Pancrase](/wiki/Pancrase "Pancrase"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Japan. In 2007 Pancrase held 17 events beginning with *Pancrase: Rising 1*.
